name: makepad-2.0-shaders
description: | CRITICAL: Use for Makepad 2.0 shader system. Triggers on: makepad shader, Sdf2d, pixel shader, draw_bg, draw_text, draw_quad, makepad gpu, shader function, pixel fn, vertex fn, instance, uniform, shader variable, sdf, premultiply, Pal.premul, GaussShadow, makepad graphics, custom draw, DrawQuad, DrawVector, 着色器, 像素, 渲染, 自定义绘制, 距离场
author: ZhangHanDong
summary_zh: 这是专为 Makepad 2.0 打造的着色器开发辅助工具，适合需要写底层 GPU 渲染代码的场景，能帮你轻松搞定 2D 距离场、像素顶点着色以及自定义界面绘制等图形开发需求。
